predictions.claim: The new negative suite rejects failing evidence, inflated scope, absent execution evidence, planned hard edges, authority and correspondence regressions, bad overrides, unearned P4, dirty evaluation, calibration errors, and incremental/full parity drift.
The existing isolated repoctl self-test still reaches P3 and finished verification.
repoctl doctor reports external.acceptance.v1 and no registry errors.
predictions.falsifier: node decision/engine/repoctl.mjs doctor fails or omits external.acceptance.v1.

predictions.claim: The modern verifier remains compatible with the finished trace018 ledger.
predictions.falsifier: node decision/engine/repoctl.mjs verify --transaction decision/trace018 --phase finished fails.

stop_conditions: hard invariant violation without accepted evidence or explicit blocker
negative suite cannot be made to fail red/green without weakening verifier semantics
P4 would require external human or production acceptance not available locally
patch scope exceeds 22 files without a re-admitted expansion reason

provenance.chronology: predictions are recorded before plan admission and outcomes
